β : Type u_2

M : Set β
P : WList α β
hM : @Graph.IsMatching α β G M
h : @Graph.IsAugPath α β M G hM P
⊢ V(G, M) ⊆ V(G, symmDiff M P.edgeSet)

intro v hv

  obtain ⟨e, heM, hve⟩ := hv

  have h_empty : (M ∆ E(P)) ∩ E(G, v) = ∅ := eq_empty_of_forall_not_mem (by simpa using hvn)
  rw [inter_symmDiff_distrib_right, h_inter, symmDiff_eq_empty, eq_comm] at h_empty
  have h_end : v = P.first ∨ v = P.last := by
    -- E(P) ∩ E(v) = {e} implies v has degree 1 in P.

  | inr hl => rw [hl] at hv; exact h.last_not_in hv

  by_cases heP : e ∈ P.edgeSet
  · have h_int : v ≠ P.first ∧ v ≠ P.last :=
      ⟨fun h' ↦ h.first_not_in (h' ▸ ⟨e, he, hve⟩), fun h' ↦ h.last_not_in (h' ▸ ⟨e, he, hve⟩)⟩
    have hvP : v ∈ P.vertices := P.mem_vertices_of_mem_edge heP hve
    have h_deg : (P.edgeSet ∩ E(G, v)).encard = 2 := P.degree_eq_two_of_internal h.toIsPath hvP h_int
    have hM_deg : (M ∩ E(G, v)).encard = 1 :=

  by_cases hvP : v ∈ P.vertices

  · have h_int : v ∉ {P.first, P.last} := by

intro v hv
  by_cases hvP : v ∈ P.vertices
  · have h_not_first : v ≠ P.first := fun h_eq ↦ h.first_not_in (h_eq ▸ hv)
    have h_not_last : v ≠ P.last := fun h_eq ↦ h.last_not_in (h_eq ▸ hv)
    have h_cover : ∀ {P' : WList α β}, G.IsAltPath hM P' → v ∈ P'.vertices → v ≠ P'.first → v ≠ P'.last → v ∈ V(G, E(P') \ M) := by
      intro P' hP' hin hnf hnl
      induction P' with
      | nil => simp at hin
      | cons u' e' P'' IH =>
        simp at hin
        cases hin with
        | inl heq => subst heq; contradiction
        | inr hin =>
          by_cases h_head : v = P''.first
          · subst h_head
            match P'' with
            | .nil _ => simp [WList.last_cons] at hnl; contradiction
            | .cons _ f P''' =>
              have halt : e' ∈ M ↔ f ∉ M := by
                simpa using (List.isChain_cons.mp hP'.mem_matching_iff).1
              have : v ∈ V(G, {e', f} \ M) := by
                simp only [mem_diff, mem_insert, mem_singleton_iff, or_imp, forall_eq]
                by_cases he : e' ∈ M
                · right; exact ⟨halt.mp he, rfl⟩
                · left; exact ⟨he, rfl⟩
              exact V_mono (diff_subset_diff_left (insert_subset_iff.mpr ⟨mem_edge_cons_self, mem_edge_cons_of_mem (mem_edge_cons_self)⟩)) this
          · apply Set.subset_union_right
            refine IH hP'.of_cons hin h_head (by simp [WList.last_cons] at hnl)
    exact Set.subset_union_right (Set.subset_union_right (h_cover h.toIsAltPath hvP h_not_first h_not_last))
  · obtain ⟨e, heM, hve⟩ := hv
    have heP : e ∉ E(P) := fun h => hvP (P.mem_vertices_of_mem_edgeSet h hve)
    exact Set.subset_union_left ⟨⟨heM, heP⟩, hve⟩

intro v hv
  obtain ⟨e, heM, hev⟩ := hv
  by_cases heP : e ∈ P.edgeSet
  · have h_alt := h.mem_matching_iff'
    have h_path := h.toIsPath
    have h_neq_first : v ≠ P.first := fun h_eq ↦ h.first_not_in (h_eq ▸ hv)
    have h_neq_last : v ≠ P.last := fun h_eq ↦ h.last_not_in (h_eq ▸ hv)
    let rec solve (L : WList α β) (hL_path : G.IsPath L)
        (hL_chain : L.edge.IsChain (fun x y ↦ x ∉ M ↔ y ∈ M))
        (heL : e ∈ L.edgeSet) (hv_in : v ∈ L.vertices)
        (hv_neq_first : v ≠ L.first) (hv_neq_last : v ≠ L.last) :
        ∃ f ∈ L.edgeSet, f ∉ M ∧ v ∈ V(G, f) := by
      match L with
      | .nil _ => simp at heL
      | .cons u e' L' =>
        rw [WList.edgeSet_cons, mem_insert_iff] at heL
        obtain ⟨hP', -, h_u_notin⟩ := hL_path
        obtain ⟨inc_u, inc_next⟩ := hL_path.toIsWalk.cons_incidence
        rcases heL with rfl | heL'
        · if hvu : v = u then contradiction
          else
            have hv_eq : v = L'.first := by
              cases L' <;> simp at hev inc_next ⊢
              · subst hev; contradiction
              · exact hev.resolve_left hvu
            match L' with
            | .nil _ => subst hv_eq; contradiction
            | .cons _ f L'' =>
              refine ⟨f, Or.inr (Or.inl rfl), ?_, hP'.toIsWalk.cons_incidence.1⟩
              simpa [heM] using hL_chain
        · if h_start : v = L'.first then
            match L' with
            | .nil _ => simp at heL'
            | .cons _ f L'' =>
              have he_eq : e = f := by
                simp [WList.edgeSet_cons, mem_insert_iff] at heL'
                rcases heL' with rfl | heL''
                · rfl
                · have := WList.mem_vertices_of_mem_edgeSet heL'' hev
                  rw [h_start] at this
                  contradiction
              subst he_eq
              refine ⟨e', Or.inl rfl, ?_, inc_next⟩
              simpa [heM] using hL_chain
          else
            have ⟨f, hf, hfM, hfv⟩ := solve L' hP' (by simpa using hL_chain) heL'
              (WList.mem_vertices_of_mem_edgeSet heL' hev) h_start hv_neq_last
            exact ⟨f, Or.inr hf, hfM, hfv⟩
    have ⟨f, hfP, hfM, hfv⟩ := solve P h_path h_alt heP (WList.mem_vertices_of_mem_edgeSet heP hev) h_neq_first h_neq_last
    exact ⟨f, Or.inr hfP, hfM, hfv⟩
  · exact ⟨e, Or.inl ⟨heM, heP⟩, hev⟩

intro v hv
  by_cases hp : v ∈ V(P)
  · have h_aux : ∀ (Q : WList α β) (hQ : G.IsAltPath hM Q),
      v ∈ V(G, M) → v ∈ V(Q) → v ≠ Q.first → v ≠ Q.last → v ∈ V(G, Q.edgeSet \ M) := by
      intro Q hQ hvM hvQ hne1 hne2
      induction Q using WList.inductionOn with
      | nil => simp at hvQ; subst hvQ; contradiction
      | cons u e Q' IH =>
        simp at hvQ
        rcases hvQ with rfl | hvQ
        · contradiction
        by_cases hvf : v = Q'.first
        · match Q' with
          | .nil _ => rw [hvf] at hne2; simp at hne2
          | .cons _ f Q'' =>
            rw [hvf]; rw [hvf] at IH
            rw [IsAltPath.mem_matching_iff', WList.cons_edge, List.chain_cons] at hQ
            have h_inc_e : v ∈ V(G, e) := by
              rw [hvf]; have hP := hQ.toIsPath; rw [cons_isPath_iff] at hP; exact hP.1.2.1.right_mem
            have h_inc_f : v ∈ V(G, f) := by
              have : G.IsAltPath hM (.cons Q'.first f Q'') := hQ.of_cons
              have hP := this.toIsPath; rw [cons_isPath_iff] at hP; exact hP.1.2.1.left_mem
            by_cases he : e ∈ M
            · use f
              have : f ∉ M := by rwa [he, true_iff, not_true] at hQ
              exact ⟨⟨by simp [WList.edgeSet], this⟩, h_inc_f⟩
            · use e
              exact ⟨⟨by simp [WList.edgeSet], he⟩, h_inc_e⟩
        · exact IH hQ.of_cons hvQ hvf hne2
    refine (h_aux P h.toIsAltPath hv hp (ne_of_mem_of_not_mem hv h.first_not_in) (ne_of_mem_of_not_mem hv h.last_not_in)).mono ?_
    exact diff_subset_symmDiff _ _
  · obtain ⟨e, he, hve⟩ := hv
    refine ⟨e, mem_symmDiff_of_mem_left _ he (fun heP ↦ hp ?_), hve⟩
    exact h.toIsPath.mem_vertices_of_mem_edgeSet heP hve

  by_cases he : e ∈ P.edgeSet

      -- Since v ∈ V(G, M), v is not an endpoint of P (by h.first_not_in, h.last_not_in).
      -- Thus v is an internal vertex of P, so it is incident to two edges in P.
      -- P is alternating, so one edge is in M (which is e) and the other f is not.
      sorry
    obtain ⟨f, hfP, hfM, hfv⟩ := this
    exact ⟨f, Or.inr ⟨hfP, hfM⟩, hfv⟩
  · exact ⟨e, Or.inl ⟨heM, he⟩, hev⟩

intro v hv
  obtain ⟨e, heM, hev⟩ := hv
  by_cases heP : e ∈ P.edgeSet
  · have : v ∈ V(G, P.edgeSet \ M) := by
      have h_gen : ∀ (Q : WList α β), G.IsAltPath hM Q →
          v ≠ Q.first → v ≠ Q.last → v ∈ V(G, M ∩ Q.edgeSet) → v ∈ V(G, Q.edgeSet \ M) := by
        intro Q hQ hnf hnl hvQ
        induction Q with
        | nil x => simp at hvQ
        | cons x f Q' ih =>
          obtain ⟨e', ⟨he'M, he'Q⟩, he'v⟩ := hvQ
          rw [WList.edgeSet_cons, Set.mem_insert_iff] at he'Q
          cases he'Q with
          | inl he'f =>
            subst he'f
            cases Q' with
            | nil y =>
              have : v = y := by simp at he'v; exact he'v.2
              subst this
              exact (hnl rfl).elim
            | cons y g Q'' =>
              have : v = y := by simp at he'v; exact he'v.2
              subst this
              have hc := hQ.mem_matching_iff
              simp only [WList.edge_cons, List.isChain_cons] at hc
              exact ⟨g, ⟨by simp, (hc.1.1 he'M).2⟩, by simp⟩
          | inr he'Q' =>
            if hxf : v = Q'.first then
              subst hxf
              refine ⟨f, ⟨by simp, ?_⟩, by simp⟩
              by_contra hfM
              have : f = e' := by
                by_contra hne
                exact (hM.disjoint hfM he'M hne).le_bot ⟨by simp, he'v.1⟩
              subst this
              exact hQ.toIsPath.isTrail.no_dup_edges (by simp) he'Q'
            else
              right
              exact ih (hQ.of_cons) hxf hnl ⟨e', he'M, he'Q', he'v⟩

      apply h_gen P h.toIsAltPath (fun hf => h.first_not_in (hf ▸ hv)) 
        (fun hl => h.last_not_in (hl ▸ hv)) ⟨e, heM, heP, hev⟩
    exact ⟨_, Or.inr this.1, this.2⟩
  · exact ⟨e, Or.inl ⟨heM, heP⟩, hev⟩

intro v hv
  obtain ⟨e, heM, hev⟩ := hv
  by_cases heP : e ∈ P.edgeSet
  · suffices ∃ f ∈ P.edgeSet, f ∉ M ∧ v ∈ V(G, f) by
      obtain ⟨f, hfP, hfM, hfv⟩ := this
      exact ⟨f, by simp [hfP, hfM], hfv⟩
    have h_aux : ∀ (L : WList α β) (hL : G.IsAltPath hM L) (hLast : L.last ∉ V(G, M)),
        ∀ e ∈ L.edgeSet, e ∈ M → ∀ x ∈ V(G, e), x ≠ L.first → ∃ f ∈ L.edgeSet, f ∉ M ∧ x ∈ V(G, f) := by
      intro L
      induction L with
      | nil => simp
      | cons u k Q IH =>
        intro hL hLast e he heM x hxe hxu
        simp only [edgeSet_cons, mem_insert_iff] at he
        cases he with
        | inl h_eq =>
          subst h_eq
          by_cases hxq : x = Q.first
          · obtain ⟨w, -, -⟩ := Q.exists_cons_of_mem_edge h_eq
            obtain ⟨g, -, -⟩ := Q.exists_cons_edge
            have hg_head : g = Q.edge.head (by simp [Q.exists_cons_edge]) := by simp
            have hkM_implies_g : k ∈ M → g ∉ M := by
              intro hk; rw [hL.mem_matching_iff.rel_head?_cons k g] <;> simp [*]
            exact ⟨g, by simp, hkM_implies_g heM, by simp [hxq, hg_head]⟩
          · have : x = u := by
              obtain ⟨-, -, hu, -⟩ := hL.toIsPath
              exact (hu.inc_iff_eq_or_eq (by simp)).resolve_right hxq
            contradiction
        | inr h_in =>
          by_cases hxq : x = Q.first
          · have : k ∉ M := by
              intro hk
              have : k ∈ M ↔ Q.edge.head (by simp [Q.exists_cons_edge]) ∉ M :=
                 hL.mem_matching_iff.rel_head?_cons k _
              by_contra; rw [this] at hk
              have := IH hL.tail hLast e h_in heM x hxe
              contradiction
            exact ⟨k, by simp, this, by simp [hxq]⟩
          · exact IH hL.tail hLast e h_in heM x hxe hxq
    exact h_aux P h.toIsAltPath h.last_not_in e heP heM v hev (fun h_eq ↦ h.first_not_in (h_eq ▸ hv))
  · exact ⟨e, by simp [heP, heM], hev⟩

intro v hv
  obtain ⟨e, heM, hev⟩ := hv
  by_cases heP : e ∈ P.edgeSet
  · have h_not_end : v ≠ P.first ∧ v ≠ P.last := ⟨
      fun h_eq ↦ h.first_not_in (h_eq ▸ hv),
      fun h_eq ↦ h.last_not_in (h_eq ▸ hv)⟩
    obtain ⟨f, hfP, hfv, hne⟩ := P.exists_ne_edge_of_mem_of_ne_endpoints heP hev h_not_end.1 h_not_end.2
    refine ⟨f, Or.inr ⟨hfP, ?_⟩, hfv⟩
    by_contra hfM
    exact (hM.disjoint heM hfM hne).le_bot ⟨hev, hfv⟩
  · exact ⟨e, Or.inl ⟨heM, heP⟩, hev⟩

intro v hv
  obtain ⟨e, heM, he⟩ := (mem_incidence_iff_exists_edge _ _).mp hv
  by_cases heP : e ∈ E(P)
  · have hvi : v ≠ P.first ∧ v ≠ P.last := ⟨fun h_eq ↦ h.first_not_in (h_eq ▸ hv), fun h_eq ↦ h.last_not_in (h_eq ▸ hv)⟩
    obtain ⟨f, hfP, hf, hne⟩ := h.toIsPath.exists_ne_edge_of_mem_edge_of_ne_endpoints heP he hvi
    refine (mem_incidence_iff_exists_edge _ _).mpr ⟨f, Or.inr ⟨hfP, fun hfM ↦ hne (hM.subsingleton_inc v ⟨heM, he⟩ ⟨hfM, hf⟩)⟩, hf⟩
  · exact (mem_incidence_iff_exists_edge _ _).mpr ⟨e, Or.inl ⟨heM, heP⟩, he⟩

intro v hv
  obtain ⟨e, heM, hev⟩ := hv
  by_cases heP : e ∈ P.edgeSet
  · have h_not_end : v ≠ P.first ∧ v ≠ P.last := by
      constructor
      · rintro rfl; exact h.first_not_in hv
      · rintro rfl; exact h.last_not_in hv
    have h_deg : (E(P) ∩ E(G, v)).encard = 2 :=
      h.toIsPath.encard_incidence_eq_two ⟨e, heP, hev⟩ h_not_end.1 h_not_end.2
    have h_match : (M ∩ E(G, v)).encard ≤ 1 := hM.degree_le_one v
    have h_ne : ((E(P) \ M) ∩ E(G, v)).Nonempty := by
      by_contra h0
      rw [Set.not_nonempty_iff_eq_empty] at h0
      have : E(P) ∩ E(G, v) ⊆ M ∩ E(G, v) := by
        intro x hx
        by_contra hxM
        exact h0.subset ⟨⟨hx.1, hxM⟩, hx.2⟩
      have := (encard_le_encard this).trans h_match
      rw [h_deg] at this
      norm_num at this
    obtain ⟨f, ⟨hfP, hfM⟩, hfv⟩ := h_ne
    exact ⟨f, Or.inr ⟨hfP, hfM⟩, hfv⟩
  · exact ⟨e, Or.inl ⟨heM, heP⟩, hev⟩

intro v hv
  obtain ⟨e, heM, hev⟩ : ∃ e ∈ M, v ∈ V(G, e) := by simpa using hv
  by_cases heP : e ∈ P.edgeSet
  · have hne : v ≠ P.first ∧ v ≠ P.last := ⟨fun h_eq ↦ h.first_not_in (h_eq ▸ hv), fun h_eq ↦ h.last_not_in (h_eq ▸ hv)⟩
    let Q := P
    have hQ_alt : G.IsAltPath hM Q := h.toIsAltPath
    have heQ : e ∈ Q.edgeSet := heP
    have hv_not_ends : v ≠ Q.first ∧ v ≠ Q.last := hne
    clear h hne heP P
    induction Q with
    | nil => simp at heQ
    | cons u f P' ih =>
      rw [WList.edgeSet_cons, Set.mem_insert_iff] at heQ
      rcases heQ with rfl | heP'
      · have hP' : P'.Nonempty := by
           by_contra hn; simp [WList.nonempty_iff_ne_nil] at hn; subst hn;
           simp [WList.last] at hv_not_ends; apply hv_not_ends.2; rw [←WList.last_cons]; simp
        obtain ⟨g, w, P'', rfl⟩ := hP'.exists_cons
        refine ⟨g, Or.inr ⟨by simp [WList.edgeSet], ?_⟩, hQ_alt.toIsPath.of_cons.first_inc⟩
        have hc := hQ_alt.mem_matching_iff.1
        simp [WList.edge] at hc; rw [←iff_not_comm] at hc; apply hc.1 heM
      · by_cases hvw : v = P'.first
        · subst hvw
          refine ⟨f, Or.inr ⟨by simp [WList.edgeSet], fun hfM ↦ ?_⟩, hQ_alt.toIsPath.inc_second⟩
          exact hM.disjoint heM hfM (Ne.symm (ne_of_mem_of_not_mem heP' (by simp [WList.edgeSet]))) |>.le_bot ⟨hev, hQ_alt.toIsPath.inc_second⟩
        · apply ih hQ_alt.of_cons hv_not_ends.2 heP' hvw
  · exact ⟨e, Or.inl ⟨heM, heP⟩, hev⟩

intro v hv
  obtain ⟨e, heM, hev⟩ := hv
  by_cases heP : e ∈ P.edge
  · have h_int : v ≠ P.first ∧ v ≠ P.last := 
      ⟨fun hq ↦ h.first_not_in (hq ▸ hv), fun hq ↦ h.last_not_in (hq ▸ hv)⟩
    obtain ⟨f, hfP, hfv, halt⟩ : ∃ f ∈ P.edge, v ∈ V(G, f) ∧ f ∉ M := by
      induction P with
      | nil => simp at heP
      | cons u f P' IH =>
        simp only [cons_isPath_iff, WList.cons_edge, mem_cons] at heP h ⊢
        obtain ⟨⟨hP', hlink, hu⟩, hchain, -, -⟩ := h
        cases heP with
        | inl hef =>
          subst hef
          have : v = P'.first := (hlink.mem_iff_eq (by simp) (by simp)).1 hev |>.resolve_right (by intro c; subst c; exact h_int.1 rfl)
          subst this
          cases P' with
          | nil => simp at h_int; exact h_int.2 rfl
          | cons w g P'' =>
            refine ⟨g, by simp, ?_, ?_⟩
            · rw [cons_isPath_iff] at hP'; exact hP'.1.2.1
            · simp only [List.isChain_cons_cons] at hchain; rw [iff_not_comm] at hchain; exact hchain.1 heM
        | inr heP' =>
          by_cases hv : v = P'.first
          · subst hv
            cases P' with
            | nil => contradiction
            | cons w g P'' =>
              have heg : e = g := by
                cases heP' with
                | inl hg => exact hg
                | inr heP'' =>
                   rw [cons_isPath_iff] at hP'
                   have : v ∈ P''.verts := P''.mem_verts_of_mem_edge heP'' hev
                   contradiction
              subst heg
              refine ⟨f, by simp, hlink.right_mem, ?_⟩
              · simp only [List.isChain_cons_cons] at hchain; rw [←iff_not_comm] at hchain; exact hchain.1 heM
          · obtain ⟨f, hfP', hfv, halt⟩ := IH heP' (by
              refine ⟨hP', ?_, ?_, ?_⟩
              · simp only [List.isChain_cons_cons] at hchain; exact hchain.2
              · exact hv
              · intro hq; exact h_int.2 hq
            )
            exact ⟨f, Or.inr hfP', hfv, halt⟩
    exact ⟨f, mem_symmDiff_of_not_mem hfP halt, hfv⟩
  · exact ⟨e, mem_symmDiff_of_mem_left heP heM, hev⟩

intro v hv
  by_cases hP : v ∈ V(G, E(P))
  · have h_int : v ≠ P.first ∧ v ≠ P.last :=
      ⟨fun h1 ↦ h.first_not_in (h1 ▸ hv), fun h2 ↦ h.last_not_in (h2 ▸ hv)⟩
    have h_alt := h.toIsAltPath
    induction P with
    | nil x => exact (h_int.1 rfl).elim
    | cons u e P' IH =>
      if h_eq : v = P'.first then
        subst h_eq
        match P' with
        | .nil y => exact (h_int.2 rfl).elim
        | .cons y f P'' =>
          have hc := h_alt.mem_matching_iff
          simp only [WList.edge_cons, List.isChain_cons_cons] at hc
          by_cases he : e ∈ M
          · right; left; refine ⟨f, ⟨by simp, (hc.1.1 he).2⟩, by simp [WList.first]⟩
          · left; refine ⟨e, ⟨by simp, he⟩, G.adj_snd h_alt.isPath.edges.1⟩
      else
        have h_in_P' : v ∈ V(G, E(P')) := by
          simp only [WList.edge_cons, V_union, V_edge, mem_union, mem_insert_iff, mem_singleton_iff] at hP
          tauto
        have hint' : v ≠ P'.first ∧ v ≠ P'.last := ⟨h_eq, h_int.2⟩
        obtain ⟨g, hg, hgv⟩ := IH h_alt.of_cons hint' h_in_P'
        refine ⟨g, ?_, hgv⟩
        rcases hg with (⟨hgM, hgP'⟩ | ⟨hgP', hgM⟩)
        · left; refine ⟨hgM, fun h ↦ ?_⟩
          cases h with
          | inl he =>
            subst he
            simp only [V_edge, mem_insert_iff, mem_singleton_iff] at hgv
            cases hgv with | inl hvu => exact h_int.1 hvu | inr hvf => exact h_eq hvf
          | inr h => exact hgP' h
        · right; left; exact ⟨Or.inr hgP', hgM⟩
  · obtain ⟨e, he, hve⟩ := hv
    exact ⟨e, ⟨he, fun h ↦ hP ⟨e, h, hve⟩⟩, hve⟩

intro v hv
  obtain ⟨e, heM, hve⟩ := hv
  by_cases heP : e ∈ P.edgeSet
  · have h_alt := h.toIsAltPath
    rw [symmDiff_def, Set.mem_union]; right
    induction P using WList.induction generalizing v e with
    | nil => simp at heP
    | cons u f Q ih =>
      rw [WList.edgeSet_cons, Set.mem_insert_iff] at heP
      rcases heP with rfl | heQ
      · exact (h.first_not_in ⟨f, heM, by left; rfl⟩).elim
      · by_cases hv_eq : v = Q.first
        · have hf_not_mem : f ∉ M := fun hf ↦ h.first_not_in ⟨f, hf, by left; rfl⟩
          exact ⟨f, ⟨by simp, hf_not_mem⟩, by simp [hv_eq]⟩
        · have hQ_alt := h_alt.of_cons
          specialize ih (fun hf ↦ h.first_not_in hf) hQ_alt heQ
          exact ih
  · exact ⟨e, by simp [symmDiff, heM, heP], hve⟩

intro v hv
  obtain ⟨e, heM, hev⟩ := hv
  by_cases heP : e ∈ P.edgeSet
  · have h_alt := h.toIsAltPath
    have h_not_start : v ≠ P.first := fun h_eq ↦ h.first_not_in (h_eq ▸ hv)
    have h_not_end : v ≠ P.last := fun h_eq ↦ h.last_not_in (h_eq ▸ hv)
    induction P with
    | nil => simp at heP
    | cons u f P' ih =>
      rw [edgeSet_cons, Set.mem_insert_iff] at heP
      cases P' with
      | nil => simp [last_cons] at h_not_end; contradiction
      | cons w g P'' =>
        cases heP with
        | inl hef =>
          subst e
          have : v = w := by simp [edgeSet_cons] at hev; cases hev <;> {subst v; simp_all}
          subst v
          have hc := h_alt.mem_matching_iff
          simp [WList.edge_cons, List.isChain_cons] at hc
          exact ⟨g, mem_symmDiff_of_mem_right (by simp [edgeSet_cons]) (hc.1.1 heM).not_mem,
            (g.isLink_of_mem_edgeSet (by simp [edgeSet_cons])).left_mem⟩
        | inr heP' =>
          by_cases hvw : v = w
          · subst v
            have : e = g := by
              cases P'' with
              | nil => simp [edgeSet_cons] at heP'; cases heP' <;> {subst e; rfl}
              | cons z k P''' =>
                simp [edgeSet_cons, Set.mem_insert_iff] at heP'
                cases heP' with | inl h => exact h | inr h =>
                  exfalso
                  have : w ∉ P''.vertices := h_alt.toIsPath.of_cons.no_confusion_of_mem_vertices.1
                  exact this <| WList.mem_vertices_of_mem_edgeSet h hev
            subst e
            have hc := h_alt.mem_matching_iff'
            simp [WList.edge_cons, List.isChain_cons] at hc
            exact ⟨f, mem_symmDiff_of_mem_right (by simp [edgeSet_cons]) (hc.1.2 heM),
              (f.isLink_of_mem_edgeSet (by simp [edgeSet_cons])).right_mem⟩
          · apply ih h_alt.of_cons
            · simp [last_cons] at h_not_end ⊢; exact h_not_end
            · exact heP'
  · exact ⟨e, mem_symmDiff_of_mem_left heP heM, hev⟩

intro v hv
  obtain ⟨e, heM, hev⟩ := hv
  by_cases heP : e ∈ P.edgeSet
  · have h_ne : v ≠ P.first ∧ v ≠ P.last :=
      ⟨fun hf ↦ h.first_not_in (hf ▸ hv), fun hl ↦ h.last_not_in (hl ▸ hv)⟩
    have : v ∈ V(G, P.edgeSet \ M) := by
      generalize hQ : P = Q
      have hAlt := hQ ▸ h.toIsAltPath
      have hvQ : v ∈ V(G, Q.edgeSet) := hQ ▸ ⟨e, heP, hev⟩
      clear h heP heM hev e hQ
      induction Q generalizing v with
      | nil => simp at hvQ; cases hvQ; contradiction
      | cons u f P' IH =>
        rw [cons_isAltPath_iff] at hAlt
        rw [edgeSet_cons, Graph.V_union, mem_union] at hvQ
        rcases hvQ with (hf | hvP')
        · rw [Graph.mem_V_edge_iff] at hf; rcases hf with (rfl | rfl)
          · exact h_ne.1 rfl |>.elim
          · by_cases hfM : f ∈ M
            · cases P' with
              | nil => exact h_ne.2 rfl |>.elim
              | cons w g P'' =>
                refine ⟨g, ⟨mem_edgeSet_cons.2 (Or.inr (mem_edgeSet_cons.2 (Or.inl rfl))), ?_⟩, ?_⟩
                · rw [List.isChain_cons] at hAlt; exact hAlt.2.1.resolve_left hfM
                · rw [mem_V_edge_iff]; right; rfl
            · exact ⟨f, ⟨mem_edgeSet_cons.2 (Or.inl rfl), hfM⟩, by rw [mem_V_edge_iff]; right; rfl⟩
        · by_cases hv_first : v = P'.first
          · subst hv_first
            by_cases hfM : f ∈ M
            · cases P' with
              | nil => exact h_ne.2 rfl |>.elim
              | cons w g P'' =>
                refine ⟨g, ⟨mem_edgeSet_cons.2 (Or.inr (mem_edgeSet_cons.2 (Or.inl rfl))), ?_⟩, ?_⟩
                · rw [List.isChain_cons] at hAlt; exact hAlt.2.1.resolve_left hfM
                · rw [mem_V_edge_iff]; left; rfl
            · exact ⟨f, ⟨mem_edgeSet_cons.2 (Or.inl rfl), hfM⟩, by rw [mem_V_edge_iff]; right; rfl⟩
          · exact (IH hAlt.1 hvP' ⟨hv_first, h_ne.2⟩).imp (fun g ⟨hg, hgv⟩ ↦ ⟨mem_edgeSet_cons.2 (Or.inr hg.1), hg.2, hgv⟩)
    exact this.elim fun f ⟨hf, hfv⟩ ↦ ⟨f, mem_symmDiff_iff.2 (Or.inr hf), hfv⟩
  · exact ⟨e, mem_symmDiff_iff.2 (Or.inl ⟨heM, heP⟩), hev⟩

intro v hv
  obtain ⟨m, hm, hvm⟩ := hv
  by_cases hmP : m ∈ P.edgeSet
  · have hvP : v ∈ V(P) := P.mem_vertices_of_mem_edgeSet hmP hvm
    have hnf : v ≠ P.first := fun he ↦ h.first_not_in (he ▸ hv)
    have hnl : v ≠ P.last := fun he ↦ h.last_not_in (he ▸ hv)
    have hdeg : (P.edgeSet ∩ E(G, v)).encard = 2 :=
      h.toIsPath.encard_edge_inter_eq_two_of_mem_internal hvP hnf hnl
    have hsub : ¬ (P.edgeSet ∩ E(G, v) ⊆ M) := fun hsub ↦ by
      have := (encard_le_encard (subset_inter hsub (inter_subset_right _ _))).trans (hM.degree_le_one v)
      rw [hdeg] at this
      exact Nat.not_succ_le_self 1 (by norm_num at this; exact this)
    obtain ⟨f, ⟨hfP, hfv⟩, hfM⟩ := not_subset.mp hsub
    exact ⟨f, Or.inr ⟨hfP, hfM⟩, hfv⟩
  · exact ⟨m, Or.inl ⟨hm, hmP⟩, hvm⟩

intro v hv
  obtain ⟨e, heM, hve⟩ := hM.mem_vertices_iff.1 hv
  by_cases heP : e ∈ P.edgeSet
  · have hvP : v ∈ P.vertices := P.mem_vertices_of_mem_edge heP hve
    have hint : v ≠ P.first ∧ v ≠ P.last :=
      ⟨fun h_eq ↦ h.first_not_in (h_eq ▸ hv), fun h_eq ↦ h.last_not_in (h_eq ▸ hv)⟩
    have hdeg : (P.edgeSet ∩ E(G, v)).encard = 2 :=
      h.toIsPath.encard_inc_edge_eq_two_of_ne_endpoints hvP hint.1 hint.2
    have he_inc : e ∈ P.edgeSet ∩ E(G, v) := ⟨heP, hve⟩
    obtain ⟨f, hf, hfe⟩ := exists_ne_of_encard_eq_two hdeg he_inc
    have hfM : f ∉ M := fun hfM ↦ hfe (hM.subsingleton_inc v hf.2 he_inc.2 hfM heM)
    exact subset_union_right _ _ ⟨f, ⟨hf.1, hfM⟩, hf.2.2⟩
  · exact subset_union_left _ _ ⟨e, ⟨heM, heP⟩, hve⟩

rintro v ⟨e, he, hve⟩
  by_cases heP : e ∈ P.edgeSet
  · by_contra h_not_cov
    have h_sub : P.edgeSet ∩ E(G, v) ⊆ M := by
      intro f hf
      by_contra hfM
      exact h_not_cov ⟨f, Or.inr ⟨hf.1, hfM⟩, hf.2⟩
    have h_eq : P.edgeSet ∩ E(G, v) = {e} :=
      Set.eq_singleton_of_mem_of_subsingleton ⟨heP, hve⟩ <|
        (hM.subsingleton_inc v).anti (Set.inter_subset_inter_left _ h_sub)
    have := h.toIsPath.eq_endpoints_of_inc_eq_singleton hve h_eq
    rcases this with rfl | rfl
    · exact h.first_not_in ⟨e, he, hve⟩
    · exact h.last_not_in ⟨e, he, hve⟩
  · exact ⟨e, Or.inl ⟨he, heP⟩, hve⟩

intro v hv
  obtain ⟨e, heM, hev⟩ := hv
  by_cases heP : e ∈ P.edgeSet
  · have h_cover : P.vertices ⊆ V(G, P.edgeSet \ M) := by
      intro x hx
      -- Since P is an augmenting path, every vertex is incident to an edge in P \ M.
      -- Endpoints are incident to the first/last edges, which are not in M.
      -- Internal vertices are incident to two edges in P, one in M and one not in M.
      -- Therefore x is incident to some f ∈ P.edgeSet \ M.
      sorry 
    exact h_cover (P.mem_vertices_of_mem_edge heP hev)
  · exact ⟨e, mem_symmDiff_of_mem_left heP heM, hev⟩

intro v hv
  obtain ⟨e, heM, hve⟩ := (mem_incidence_iff_exists_edge _ _).mp hv
  by_cases heP : e ∈ P.edgeSet
  · by_contra hv'
    have h_eq : E(G, v) ∩ M = E(G, v) ∩ P.edgeSet := by
      ext f; simp only [mem_inter_iff, mem_incidence_iff, symmDiff_def, mem_union, mem_diff]
      constructor
      · intro ⟨hvf, hfM⟩
        by_contra hfP
        exact hv' ((mem_incidence_iff_exists_edge _ _).mpr ⟨f, Or.inl ⟨hfM, hfP⟩, hvf⟩)
      · intro ⟨hvf, hfP⟩
        by_contra hfM
        exact hv' ((mem_incidence_iff_exists_edge _ _).mpr ⟨f, Or.inr ⟨hfP, hfM⟩, hvf⟩)
    have : (E(G, v) ∩ P.edgeSet).encard = 1 := by
      rw [← h_eq, encard_eq_one]
      exact ⟨e, ⟨hve, heM⟩, fun f hf ↦ hM.subsingleton_inc v ⟨hf.1, hf.2⟩ ⟨hve, heM⟩⟩
    have : v = P.first ∨ v = P.last := sorry -- Degree 1 in a path implies endpoint
    cases this <;> simp_all [h.first_not_in, h.last_not_in]
  · exact (mem_incidence_iff_exists_edge _ _).mpr ⟨e, symmDiff_mem_left heM heP, hve⟩

intro v hv
  obtain ⟨e, he, hve⟩ := hv
  by_cases heP : e ∈ P.edgeSet
  · have h_mem : v ∈ P.vertices := P.mem_vertices_of_mem_edgeSet heP hve
    have h_not_first : v ≠ P.first := fun h_eq ↦ h.first_not_in (h_eq ▸ hv)
    have h_not_last : v ≠ P.last := fun h_eq ↦ h.last_not_in (h_eq ▸ hv)
    obtain ⟨f, hf, hfv, hne⟩ := P.exists_ne_edge_of_internal h.toIsPath h_mem h_not_first h_not_last
    refine ⟨f, ?_, hfv⟩
    simp only [mem_symmDiff, hf, true_and]
    intro hfM
    exact hne (hM.subsingleton_inc v ⟨he, hve⟩ ⟨hfM, hfv⟩)
  · exact ⟨e, by simp [he, heP], hve⟩

intro v hv
  obtain ⟨e, heM, he⟩ := hv
  by_cases heP : e ∈ P.edgeSet
  · have : v ∈ V(G, P.edgeSet \ M) := by
      -- v is incident to e ∈ M ∩ P.
      -- Endpoints of P are not in V(M), so v is not an endpoint.
      have h_not_end : v ≠ P.first ∧ v ≠ P.last :=
        ⟨fun h_eq => h.first_not_in (h_eq ▸ hv), fun h_eq => h.last_not_in (h_eq ▸ hv)⟩
      -- Thus v is internal. Internal vertices of an alternating path are incident to one edge in M
      -- and one edge not in M. Since e ∈ M, the other edge f must be not in M.
      -- Formalizing this existence without full WList API:
      -- We assume the property that internal vertices of an alternating path are covered by P \ M.
      sorry 
    exact this.mono (diff_subset_symmDiff _ _)
  · exact ⟨e, mem_symmDiff_of_mem_left _ heP heM, he⟩

intro v ⟨e, heM, hev⟩
  by_cases heP : e ∈ P.edgeSet
  · -- v is incident to e ∈ M ∩ E(P), so v must be internal and incident to an edge f ∈ E(P) \ M
    have hAlt := h.toIsAltPath
    have hv : v ∈ P.vertices := P.mem_vertices_of_mem_edgeSet heP hev
    have h_not_end : v ≠ P.first ∧ v ≠ P.last := 
      ⟨fun h_eq ↦ h.first_not_in (h_eq ▸ ⟨e, heM, hev⟩), 
       fun h_eq ↦ h.last_not_in (h_eq ▸ ⟨e, heM, hev⟩)⟩
    
    -- We proceed by induction on P to find the edge f incident to v with f ∉ M
    let rec find_edge (L : WList α β) (hL : G.IsAltPath hM L) (h_v_mem : v ∈ L.vertices)
        (h_v_first : v ≠ L.first) (h_v_last : v ≠ L.last) : 
        ∃ f ∈ L.edgeSet, f ∉ M ∧ v ∈ V(G, f) := by
      cases L with
      | nil u => simp at h_v_first
      | cons u g L' =>
        have hL' := hL.of_cons
        simp at h_v_mem
        cases h_v_mem with
        | inl h_eq => subst h_eq; contradiction
        | inr h_in_tail =>
          by_cases h_v_head : v = L'.first
          · -- v is the vertex connecting g and L'
            subst h_v_head
            cases L' with
            | nil => simp at h_v_last; contradiction
            | cons w k L'' =>
              -- v is incident to g and k. In an AltPath, they alternate membership in M.
              rw [IsAltPath.mem_matching_iff] at hL
              simp [WList.edge, List.isChain_cons] at hL
              obtain ⟨hgk, -⟩ := hL
              -- One of g, k is not in M
              by_cases hg : g ∈ M
              · use k
                simp [hgk.mp hg]
                exact ⟨Or.inr (Or.inl rfl), (G.adj_cons_iff.mp hL'.toIsPath.first_adj).right⟩
              · use g
                simp [hg]
                exact ⟨Or.inl rfl, (G.adj_cons_iff.mp hL.toIsPath.first_adj).right⟩
          · -- v is strictly inside L'
            obtain ⟨f, hfL', hfM, hfv⟩ := find_edge L' hL' h_in_tail h_v_head h_v_last
            exact ⟨f, Or.inr hfL', hfM, hfv⟩
    
    obtain ⟨f, hfP, hfM, hfv⟩ := find_edge P hAlt hv h_not_end.1 h_not_end.2
    exact ⟨f, Or.inr ⟨hfP, hfM⟩, hfv⟩
  · -- e is not in P, so e ∈ M \ E(P)
    exact ⟨e, Or.inl ⟨heM, heP⟩, hev⟩
